message:
Add system routes and extend test coverage

- Implement system routes for health/status endpoints
- Extend snapshot service tests
- Add system routes tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Decide and document integration strategy: dedicated NTM AgentDriver vs tmux adapter.

- Map NTM session/pane model to AgentDriver semantics.

Definition of Done:
- Design note stored in repo (comment/doc) guiding implementation.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:53.791420634Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T07:01:37.459620250Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T07:01:37.459574423Z","close_reason":"Added ADR-004 recommending dedicated NTM AgentDriver over tmux adapter","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["design","ntm"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1khz","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:53.811194615Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1kkl","title":"Tests: manifest fallback + refresh + provenance","description":"Goal:\n- Add unit/integration tests for manifest fallback, refresh, and provenance fields.\n\nScope:\n- Missing/invalid manifest -> fallback registry.\n- Refresh endpoint updates cache.\n- Readiness includes manifest path/hash/version.\n- Detailed structured logging for failure paths.\n\nDefinition of Done:\n- Tests pass with rich logs; failures are diagnosable without reproduction.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:48:52.526518595Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:12.855210721Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","registry","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1kkl","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:48:52.593722967Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1kkl","depends_on_id":"bd-1w9e","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:10.360247413Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1kkl","depends_on_id":"bd-29qb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:12.855139668Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1kkl","depends_on_id":"bd-3cpq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:11.656775388Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-1m7s","title":"Tests for NTM driver + ingest service","description":"Goal:\n- Add unit tests + mocks for NTM driver and ingest service with detailed logging assertions.\n\nScope:\n- Validate state mapping, error handling, and backoff behavior.\n- Ensure log events include correlationId, session/pane identifiers, and NTM command context.\n\nDefinition of Done:\n- Unit tests validate state mapping and error handling.\n- Logging assertions confirm structured fields are emitted.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:58.797304872Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T06:08:38.685240526Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ntm","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1m7s","depends_on_id":"bd-1b9b","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:46.730349085Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1m7s","depends_on_id":"bd-228a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:08:38.683593654Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1m7s","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:58.817976113Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-1ncx","title":"E2E tests: NTM driver + WS bridge","description":"Goal:\n- Validate NTM driver + WebSocket bridge end-to-end with stubbed robot output.\n\nScope:\n- Simulate state transitions, output streaming, tool events.\n- Detailed logging assertions for WS payloads.\n\nDefinition of Done:\n- E2E tests pass and logs diagnose failures clearly.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:09:36.261100378Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T06:09:30.585075249Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","ntm","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1ncx","depends_on_id":"bd-1b9b","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:08:52.650537977Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1ncx","depends_on_id":"bd-228a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:09:00.598056519Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1ncx","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:09:36.509798833Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1ncx","depends_on_id":"bd-28om","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:09:08.842101206Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

- Add br client wrapper (CRUD + ready/list/show/close/update/sync).

- Prefer --json output, handle auto-import behavior, map errors.

- Unit: bd-3gja + bd-9v6g (parsing + runner).
- E2E: bd-mipc (stub harness).
- Schema drift: bd-20sm (JSON snapshot).

- br client exposes typed API used by gateway services.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:46.179500408Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T07:49:17.251823895Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T07:49:17.251308504Z","close_reason":"Implemented br client wrapper in flywheel-clients","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["br","clients"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-35cf","depends_on_id":"bd-1d1j","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:37.873523713Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-35cf","depends_on_id":"bd-2p50","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:46.198858636Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-35cf","depends_on_id":"bd-pfkx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:29.767910674Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

- Validate NTM alerting rules and metadata for health, stuck, and termination signals.

 {"id":"bd-3cpq","title":"Manifest cache invalidation + refresh endpoint","description":"Goal:\n- Allow manual refresh of manifest cache and mtime-based invalidation.\n\nScope:\n- Expose /setup/refresh or similar (idempotent).\n- Log cache hits/misses and refresh reasons.\n- Add unit/contract tests for refresh behavior (see test tasks).\n\nDefinition of Done:\n- Manifest updates are reflected without server restart.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:45:38.522282293Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:05.366030916Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","api","registry"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3cpq","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:45:38.558630876Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3cpq","depends_on_id":"bd-1sz8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:46:01.163098690Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3cpq","depends_on_id":"bd-ka28","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:45:59.229139924Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
